title: equisetum hyemale var. variegatum
intro: Equisetum hyemale var. variegatum, also known as the striped horse's tail, is a variant of the Equisetum hyemale plant, belonging to the horsetail family and characterized by its distinctive striped appearance. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum hyemale var. variegatum include its potential to help reduce blood pressure, improve kidney function, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
